title: Teta (disambiguation)
content:
'''Teta''' or '''Empress Teta''' could mean several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Teta]]''', according to [[Qel-Droma Epics]], [[Empress]] of the [[Empress Teta system]]
*'''[[Empress Teta]]''', an astronomical object in the [[Deep Core]]
*'''[[Empress Teta system]]''', the star system hosting Empress Teta
*'''[[Teta (duke)|Teta]]''', a [[Duke]]
*'''[[Tetarick sea urchin]]''', a spiky [[Species|creature]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Teta/Legends|Teta]]''', [[Empress/Legends|Empress]] of the [[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]]
*'''[[Empress Teta/Legends|Empress Teta]]''', the planet formerly known as Koros Major, renamed after the above's death
*'''[[Empress Teta system/Legends|Empress Teta system]]''', also named after Teta
*'''[[Teta (duke)/Legends|Teta]]''', a [[Duke/Legends|Duke]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]
*'''[[Empress Teta's Crown Jewels]]''', a collection of weapons, armor and jewelry

{{Disambig}}

|fr=Teta
}}
